name: bisuteria-back-y-front
description: Sistema de gestión bisutería - Backend y Frontend

scripts.dev: start /B npm run dev:backend & start /B npm run dev:frontend
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && start /B npm run start:backend:prod && npm run start:frontend
scripts.prod: npm run build && start /B npm run start:backend:prod && npm run start:frontend
